title: Spartan Weaponry: Aether
description: Addon mod for Spartan Weaponry that adds compatibility with The Aether and its addons.
body:
**
Expands [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry) with new weapons and traits based on [The Aether](https://github.com/The-Aether-Team/The-Aether) and its addons.
**
### Currently supported: - [**The Aether**](https://github.com/The-Aether-Team/The-Aether) - **Skyroot** - Double Drops - Mobs drop 2x as many items - **Holystone** - Prospect - 4% chance of dropping an Ambrosium Shard while attacking - **Zanite** - Adaptive - Gains strength the more it is used - **Gravitite** - Updraft - Flings foes into the air

- [**Deep Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether) (optional) - **Skyjade** - Ethereal - Starts very powerful. Wears down with use - **Stratus** - Updraft - Flings foes into the air

- [**Aether Gear Expansion**](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aether-gear-expansion) (optional) - **Aetherite** - Reactive - Increased strength based on recently dealt damage - Floating - Will float when dropped in the Aether ###
Planned updates: - Fix any [bugs](https://github.com/KreloX/SpartanAether/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Abug)
**
